prompt: Create a highly realistic vertical smartphone street portrait of a young East Asian woman posing close to the camera at night in an urban shopping street. She has long dark brown to black hair with soft straight bangs, glossy strands, and subtle pink neon highlights from a sign above; one eye is playfully winking while the other looks directly into the lens, with a gentle closed-mouth smile. Her right hand is raised elegantly in front of her lips and chin, showing long pale manicured nails. She wears small hoop and cartilage earrings, a thin black choker necklace with a small charm, a gray spaghetti-strap top, and an oversized black off-shoulder jacket slipping down to reveal one shoulder; a thin chain strap crosses her left side. The background is softly blurred with a closed metal shop shutter, concrete storefront walls, a glowing red-and-white neon sign with unreadable cursive lettering, and two distant pedestrians on the left, creating natural street depth. Use cool night lighting mixed with pink neon glow, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, natural makeup with winged eyeliner and rosy lips, candid social-media photography style, high detail, 9:16 vertical composition, close crop from head to upper torso, no watermark, no extra text, no distorted hands or facial features.
promptEn: Create a highly realistic vertical smartphone street portrait of a young East Asian woman posing close to the camera at night in an urban shopping street. She has long dark brown to black hair with soft straight bangs, glossy strands, and subtle pink neon highlights from a sign above; one eye is playfully winking while the other looks directly into the lens, with a gentle closed-mouth smile. Her right hand is raised elegantly in front of her lips and chin, showing long pale manicured nails. She wears small hoop and cartilage earrings, a thin black choker necklace with a small charm, a gray spaghetti-strap top, and an oversized black off-shoulder jacket slipping down to reveal one shoulder; a thin chain strap crosses her left side. The background is softly blurred with a closed metal shop shutter, concrete storefront walls, a glowing red-and-white neon sign with unreadable cursive lettering, and two distant pedestrians on the left, creating natural street depth. Use cool night lighting mixed with pink neon glow, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, natural makeup with winged eyeliner and rosy lips, candid social-media photography style, high detail, 9:16 vertical composition, close crop from head to upper torso, no watermark, no extra text, no distorted hands or facial features.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的竖版手机街头肖像，拍摄对象为 年轻东亚女性，在夜间的城市商业街近距离面对镜头摆拍。她留着深棕色至黑色的长发，带有柔顺的直刘海，发丝光泽感强，上方招牌投射出淡淡的粉色霓虹光影；她一只眼睛俏皮地眨着，另一只眼睛直视镜头，嘴角带着温柔的微笑。她的右手优雅地抬起置于唇部和下巴前，露出修长的浅色美甲。她佩戴着小圆环耳饰和耳骨钉，颈间戴着带有小吊坠的细黑色项圈，身穿灰色细肩带上衣，外搭一件黑色廓形露肩夹克，夹克滑落露出单侧肩膀；一条细链条斜挎在左侧。背景经过柔焦处理，可见关闭的金属卷帘门、混凝土店面墙壁、带有模糊草书字体的红白霓虹灯招牌，左侧远处有两名行人，营造出自然的街头纵深感。使用 冷色调夜光与粉色霓虹辉光交织，浅景深，真实的皮肤纹理，带有猫眼眼线和玫瑰色唇妆的自然妆容，社交媒体抓拍风格，高细节，9:16 竖版构图，头部至上半身的近景裁剪，无水印，无额外文字，无扭曲的手部或面部特征。
